_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide analyses and support for effectiveness assessment.
reference_document_element_description: Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfillment, examiner access management, findings response preparation, and corrective action plan development.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.544), RC-K-001 (RC, cosine: 0.539).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.395). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [analyses, assessment, effectiveness, provide, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, action, coordinate, corrective, development, examination] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.896, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Provide analyses and support for effectiveness assessment." and "Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.589 > STS 0.395 (gap +0.194). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [analyses, assessment, effectiveness, provide, support]. WIDAI terms: [access, action, coordinate, corrective, development, examination].

signals.detail: STS 0.395 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.194 with low STS 0.395. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
